    Exceptions
    Description
    javadraw.errors.InvalidArgumentException
    Use IllegalArgumentException instead
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    javadraw.KeyConstants.KEY_HELD
    This value is only used internally and is not fired
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    javadraw.Window.exit()
    does nothing at the moment.
    javadraw.Window.mouseDown(int, Location)
    Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
    javadraw.Window.mouseDrag(int, Location)
    Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
    javadraw.Window.mouseUp(int, Location)
    Please use argument order (Location, int) or (Location)
